name: Quick-Roasted Tomatoes with Garlic and Thyme
method: In a wide mixing cup, put the tomato pieces.
Add the chopped garlic, salt, peppers, seasoning, and clean thyme.
Sprinkle with a decent amount of extra virgin olive, around ¼ cup or
so. Toss it to coat it.
Use a rim to move the tomato to a baking tray. Place the tomatoes,
flesh lengthways in one single sheet.
Grill for 30 minutes to an hour in your hot oven just until the
tomatoes have fallen to your desired thickness.
Withdraw from the heat. Feel free to serve it with more fresh thyme
and a few splash of feta cheese if you intend to eat it soon.
Enjoy it at ambient temperature or hotter.
